name: p13c_nmr_polarity
formula: 99% bootstrap sign-positive Delta T2 gate powered for 5% active-state polarity reversal; design target only, no observed NMR data yet
tier: Tier 2 mechanism + Tier 3 active-state Delta T2 calibration anchor pending O.21/O.33
app_r_precision_str: OPEN_CONDITIONAL executable preregistration: n=24 per isotope, 3 repeated acquisitions, 99% bootstrap CI [0.0136, 0.0861], systematic floor 0.2 ppm, primary power 0.800, simulated beta 0.201, replication-pair power 0.638

power_statistic.pilot_variance_acceptance_threshold: Accept decisive 5% confirmation/falsification only if pilot total per-preparation sigma fraction is <= max_total_per_preparation_sigma_fraction_for_80pct_power.

extra.decision_rule: Decisive sign-positive gate requires the 99% bootstrap CI for Delta T2 = T2(17O)-T2(16O) to exclude zero, exceed the measurement floor, have positive sign, and pass the pilot variance gate for the 5% powered target. Significant negative polarity fails P.13c. Sign-positive significant effects below 5% are positive-sensitivity / effect-size revision, not confirmation or failure.
extra.scope: Executable preregistration design audit. Lab-data status remains open until blinded active-state NMR measurements are acquired.
